ogTitle: Killabakh vs Killarney Heights: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Killabakh and Killarney Heights.
heading: Killabakh vs Killarney Heights — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Killabakh, New South Wales and Killarney Heights, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Killarney Heights has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Killabakh (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Killabakh or Killarney Heights safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Killabakh has a flood risk score of 37/100, while Killarney Heights scores 23/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Killabakh scores 37/100 for bushfire risk. Killarney Heights scores 37/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Killabakh or Killarney Heights?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Killarney Heights has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.18% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
